import asyncio
import json
import shutil
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path

from service import Database, LeaseJobService, LogicalClock, create_app

root = Path.cwd()
test_dir = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix=\"lease-job-service-test-\", dir=root))
database_path = str(test_dir / \"service.sqlite3\")

async def call(app, method, path, value=None, content_type=\"application/json\"):
    if value is None:
        body = b\"\"
    elif isinstance(value, bytes):
        body = value
    else:
        body = json.dumps(value).encode()
    headers = []
    if content_type is not None:
        headers.append((b\"content-type\", content_type.encode()))
    headers.append((b\"content-length\", str(len(body)).encode()))
    scope = {
        \"type\": \"http\",
        \"asgi\": {\"version\": \"3.0\", \"spec_version\": \"2.0\"},
        \"http_version\": \"1.1\",
        \"method\": method,
        \"scheme\": \"http\",
        \"path\": path,
        \"raw_path\": path.encode(),
        \"query_string\": b\"\",
        \"headers\": headers,
        \"client\": (\"test\", 123),
        \"server\": (\"test\", 80),
    }
    seen = False
    messages = []
    async def receive():
        nonlocal seen
        if not seen:
            seen = True
            return {\"type\": \"http.request\", \"body\": body, \"more_body\": False}
        return {\"type\": \"http.disconnect\"}
    async def send(message):
        messages.append(message)
    await app(scope, receive, send)
    start = next(message for message in messages if message[\"type\"] == \"http.response.start\")
    raw = b\"\".join(message.get(\"body\", b\"\") for message in messages if message[\"type\"] == \"http.response.body\")
    return start[\"status\"], dict(start[\"headers\"]), raw

async def main():
    app = create_app(LeaseJobService(Database(database_path), LogicalClock(100)))
    await app.router.startup()
    try:
        status, headers, raw = await call(app, \"GET\", \"/healthz\", content_type=None)
        assert (status, headers[b\"content-type\"], json.loads(raw)) == (200, b\"application/json\", {\"status\": \"ok\", \"contract_version\": \"1.0.0\"})
        assert json.loads((await call(app, \"GET\", \"/_evaluator/clock\", content_type=None))[2]) == {\"now_ms\": 100}
        status, _, raw = await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/jobs\", {\"idempotency_key\": \"k\", \"payload\": \"p\"})
        assert status == 201
        job = json.loads(raw)
        job_id = job[\"job_id\"]
        status, _, raw = await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/jobs\", {\"idempotency_key\": \"k\", \"payload\": \"p\"})
        assert status == 200 and json.loads(raw)[\"job_id\"] == job_id
        status, _, raw = await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/jobs\", {\"idempotency_key\": \"k\", \"payload\": \"different\"})
        assert status == 409 and json.loads(raw)[\"error\"][\"code\"] == \"idempotency_conflict\"
        status, _, raw = await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/leases\", {\"worker_id\": \"w\", \"ttl_ms\": 10})
        assert status == 200
        grant = json.loads(raw)
        assert grant[\"job\"][\"job_id\"] == job_id and grant[\"job\"][\"state\"] == \"leased\"
        token = grant[\"lease_token\"]
        assert (await call(app, \"POST\", f\"/v1/jobs/{job_id}/heartbeat\", {\"lease_token\": token, \"ttl_ms\": 20}))[0] == 200
        assert (await call(app, \"POST\", f\"/v1/jobs/{job_id}/complete\", {\"lease_token\": token, \"result\": \"done\"}))[0] == 200
        complete = json.loads((await call(app, \"GET\", f\"/v1/jobs/{job_id}\", content_type=None))[2])
        assert complete[\"state\"] == \"succeeded\" and complete[\"result\"] == \"done\" and complete[\"lease\"] is None
        assert (await call(app, \"POST\", f\"/v1/jobs/{job_id}/heartbeat\", {\"lease_token\": token, \"ttl_ms\": 10}))[0] == 409
        assert (await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/leases\", {\"worker_id\": \"w\", \"ttl_ms\": 10}))[0] == 204

        assert (await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/jobs\", {\"idempotency_key\": \"bad\", \"payload\": 1}))[0] == 422
        assert (await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/jobs\", {\"idempotency_key\": \"bad\", \"payload\": \"x\", \"extra\": 1}))[0] == 422
        status, _, raw = await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/jobs\", b\"{\", \"application/json\")
        assert status == 400 and json.loads(raw)[\"error\"][\"code\"] == \"invalid_json\"
        assert (await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/jobs\", b\"{\", \"text/plain\"))[0] == 415
        assert (await call(app, \"GET\", \"/v1/jobs/not-a-uuid\", content_type=None))[0] == 422
        assert (await call(app, \"GET\", \"/v1/jobs/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000\", content_type=None))[0] == 404

        status, _, raw = await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/jobs\", {\"idempotency_key\": \"expire\", \"payload\": \"x\"})
        exp_id = json.loads(raw)[\"job_id\"]
        status, _, raw = await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/leases\", {\"worker_id\": \"first\", \"ttl_ms\": 10})
        exp_token = json.loads(raw)[\"lease_token\"]
        assert status == 200
        assert (await call(app, \"PUT\", \"/_evaluator/clock\", {\"now_ms\": 110}))[0] == 200
        status, _, raw = await call(app, \"PUT\", \"/_evaluator/clock\", {\"now_ms\": 109})
        assert status == 409 and json.loads(raw)[\"error\"][\"code\"] == \"clock_rewind\"
        expired = json.loads((await call(app, \"GET\", f\"/v1/jobs/{exp_id}\", content_type=None))[2])
        assert expired[\"state\"] == \"pending\" and expired[\"lease\"] is None
        assert (await call(app, \"POST\", f\"/v1/jobs/{exp_id}/complete\", {\"lease_token\": exp_token, \"result\": \"late\"}))[0] == 409
        status, _, raw = await call(app, \"POST\", \"/v1/leases\", {\"worker_id\": \"second\", \"ttl_ms\": 10})
        grant2 = json.loads(raw)
        assert status == 200 and grant2[\"job\"][\"job_id\"] == exp_id and grant2[\"lease_token\"] "'!= exp_token
        assert (await call(app, "POST", f"/v1/jobs/{exp_id}/fail", {"lease_token": grant2["lease_token"], "failure": {"code": "E", "message": "failed"}}))[0] == 200
        failed = json.loads((await call(app, "GET", f"/v1/jobs/{exp_id}", content_type=None))[2])
        assert failed["state"] == "failed" and failed["failure"] == {"code": "E", "message": "failed"}

        status, _, raw = await call(app, "POST", "/v1/jobs", {"idempotency_key": "durable", "payload": "keep"})
        durable_id = json.loads(raw)["job_id"]
        status, _, raw = await call(app, "POST", "/v1/leases", {"worker_id": "durable-worker", "ttl_ms": 1000})
        durable_token = json.loads(raw)["lease_token"]
        assert status == 200
    finally:
        await app.router.shutdown()

    restarted = create_app(LeaseJobService(Database(database_path), LogicalClock(110)))
    await restarted.router.startup()
    try:
        restored = json.loads((await call(restarted, "GET", f"/v1/jobs/{durable_id}", content_type=None))[2])
        assert restored["state"] == "leased" and restored["lease"]["worker_id"] == "durable-worker"
        assert (await call(restarted, "POST", f"/v1/jobs/{durable_id}/complete", {"lease_token": durable_token, "result": "after restart"}))[0] == 200
    finally:
        await restarted.router.shutdown()

asyncio.run(main())
print("local behavioral checks passed")
shutil.rmtree(test_dir)
PY'

from starlette.requests import ClientDisconnect, Request

from starlette.types import ASGIApp, Message, Receive, Scope, Send

RequestResponseEndpoint = Callable[[Request], Awaitable[Response]]

class _CachedRequest(Request):
    """
    If the user calls Request.body() from their dispatch function
    we cache the entire request body in memory and pass that to downstream middlewares,
    but if they call Request.stream() then all we do is send an
    empty body so that downstream things don't hang forever.
    """

    def __init__(self, scope: Scope, receive: Receive):
        super().__init__(scope, receive)
        self._wrapped_rcv_disconnected = False
        self._wrapped_rcv_consumed = False
        self._wrapped_rc_stream = self.stream()

    async def wrapped_receive(self) -> Message:
        # wrapped_rcv state 1: disconnected
        if self._wrapped_rcv_disconnected:
            # we've already sent a disconnect to the downstream app
            # we don't need to wait to get another one
            # (although most ASGI servers will just keep sending it)
            return {"type": "http.disconnect"}
        # wrapped_rcv state 1: consumed but not yet disconnected
        if self._wrapped_rcv_consumed:
            # since the downstream app has consumed us all that is left
            # is to send it a disconnect
            if self._is_disconnected:
                # the middleware has already seen the disconnect
                # since we know the client is disconnected no need to wait
                # for the message
                self._wrapped_rcv_disconnected = True
                return {"type": "http.disconnect"}
            # we don't know yet if the client is disconnected or not
            # so we'll wait until we get that message
            msg = await self.receive()
            if msg["type"] != "http.disconnect":  # pragma: no cover
                # at this point a disconnect is all that we should be receiving
                # if we get something else, things went wrong somewhere
                raise RuntimeError(f"Unexpected message received: {msg['type']}")
            self._wrapped_rcv_disconnected = True
            return msg

        # wrapped_rcv state 3: not yet consumed
        if getattr(self, "_body", None) is not None:
            # body() was called, we return it even if the client disconnected
            self._wrapped_rcv_consumed = True
            return {
                "type": "http.request",
                "body": self._body,
                "more_body": False,
            }
        elif self._stream_consumed:
            # stream() was called to completion
            # return an empty body so that downstream apps don't hang
            # waiting for a disconnect
            self._wrapped_rcv_consumed = True
            return {
                "type": "http.request",
                "body": b"",
                "more_body": False,
            }
        else:
            # body() was never called and stream() wasn't consumed
            try:
                stream = self.stream()
                chunk = await stream.__anext__()
                self._wrapped_rcv_consumed = self._stream_consumed
                return {
                    "type": "http.request",
                    "body": chunk,
                    "more_body": not self._stream_consumed,
                }
            except ClientDisconnect:
                self._wrapped_rcv_disconnected = True
                return {"type": "http.disconnect"}
